'''Daminia''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> located in the [[Daminia system/Legends|Daminia system]], a part of the [[Perkell sector/Legends|Perkell sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[damind]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystals]] could be found there.<ref name="KOTOR" />

By [[3959 BBY]], Daminia was a part of the "civilized [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]," the territory that had been widely [[Scout/Legends|explored]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TEA" /> At some point, ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] harvested on Daminia the damind [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|163|damind}}</ref> which could be found in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> by [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="3956 BBY">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> During the [[Jedi Civil War]] of 3959 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]–3956 BBY, Daminia fell within the territory controlled by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|empire]] founded by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Daminia was first mentioned in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.<ref name="KOTOR" /> The ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2008]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] sourcebook published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', erroneously referred to the damind [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] crystals as the "daminia" crystals.<ref name="KOTORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Daminia [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square Q-7.<ref name="TEA" />
